title: Week 14 backup runbook
acceptanceTarget: Explicitly preserve database, volume, encryption key, and Compose/env/proxy config before update or incident response.

scope.referenceArchitecture: Week 10 VPS + Docker Compose + Caddy + PostgreSQL

backupSet.why: Preserves PostgreSQL state such as workflows, credentials metadata, executions, users, and settings.

backupSet.method: Docker volume archive with an alpine tar helper container
backupSet.why: Preserves /home/node/.n8n data including encryption keys, logs, source control assets, and filesystem binary data when applicable.

backupSet.method: Docker volume archive with an alpine tar helper container
backupSet.why: Preserves reverse proxy state, certificates, and Caddy configuration cache when the deployment relies on those volumes.

backupSet.method: Extract N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY from .env or controlled secret manager
backupSet.why: n8n credentials are encrypted with this key; restoring the database without the same key can leave credentials unusable.

backupSet.method: Copy source config and render docker compose config before the change window
backupSet.why: Recreates image tags, environment variables, database settings, webhook URL, editor URL, proxy routes, and TLS behavior.
Detects corrupted or partial backup transfer before restore.

commands.command: APP_DIR="artifacts/week-10-vps-caddy"; BACKUP_ID="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"; BACKUP_DIR="backups/${BACKUP_ID}"; cd "${APP_DIR}"; mkdir -p "${BACKUP_DIR}"; chmod 700 "${BACKUP_DIR}"
docker compose --env-file .env -f compose.yaml config > "${BACKUP_DIR}/docker-compose.rendered.yaml"; cp compose.yaml .env Caddyfile "${BACKUP_DIR}/"
docker compose --env-file .env -f compose.yaml exec -T postgres pg_dump -U "${POSTGRES_USER}" -d "${POSTGRES_DB}" -Fc --no-owner --no-acl > "${BACKUP_DIR}/database.dump"

verification: database.dump exists and pg_restore -l database.dump can list the archive
n8n_data.tgz exists and tar -tzf n8n_data.tgz can list the archive
N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY in n8n-encryption-key.txt matches the controlled production key
compose.yaml, .env, Caddyfile, and docker-compose.rendered.yaml are in the same backup set
SHA256SUMS verifies after copying the backup set to off-host storage
Backup set is encrypted at rest and stored outside the production host
failureRules: Do not upgrade if database.dump is missing or empty.
Do not upgrade if n8n_data.tgz is missing.
Do not upgrade if N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing or unverified.
Do not upgrade if Compose/env/proxy config is missing.
Do not upgrade if checksum verification fails.
